input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.11.5.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.11.5.4
            TITLE: each accumulator container(s) must have a label with the following data during charging:

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.11.5.4: Each Accumulator Container(s) must have a label with the following data during Charging:
EV.11.5.4 Each Accumulator Container(s) must have a label with the following data during Charging: 
Team name and Electrical System Officer phone number(s)

final_answer: Each Accumulator Container(s) must have a label with the following data during Charging: Team name and Electrical System Officer phone number(s)
